description:
Fragment of an Arabic family letter (فبالله عليك . . . باتم السلام وعلى الوالد افضل السلام . . .). May allude to a bad harvest (مع اجاحته التي قد علمتها). Reused for a Hebrew text between the lines and another Hebrew text on recto.

(The second fragment sharing this shelfmark is unrelated -- late magical recipes in Judaeo-Arabic and Hebrew.)
